sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.body: Groopay (“app”, “we”, “us”) respects the privacy of its users. This Privacy Policy explains what personal data is collected when you use the app, how it is used, and how it is protected.

sections.heading: 2. Data We Collect
sections.body:
Account and Profile Information
You sign in to the app with your Google or Apple account. Your email address and name are imported into the system for authentication purposes. We do not store passwords.

Group and Expense Data
Groups you create, expenses you add, split details, and payment history are stored linked to your account. This data is shared only with the members of the relevant group.

Preferences
Your language preference, default currency, and profile display information (name, avatar color) are stored.

Subscription Information
The status of your Pro subscription (active/inactive) is stored in our database. Payment details (card number, billing address, etc.) are processed exclusively by the app store; we do not have access to this data.

Device and Notification Data
If you grant notification permission, your device push token is stored to send push notifications. You can revoke notification permission at any time from your device settings.

sections.heading: 3. Data We Do Not Collect
sections.body:
- IBAN and bank account information is never stored in our app. IBAN sharing occurs in real time and is not saved to the database.
- We do not collect location data.
- We do not build advertising profiles.
- We do not use third-party analytics or advertising SDKs.

sections.heading: 4. How We Use Your Data
sections.body:
The data we collect is used solely for the following purposes:

- Providing the core functions of the app (group management, expense splitting, balance calculation)
- Identifying your account and ensuring its security
- Verifying your Pro subscription status
- Sending notifications to group members (only if permission has been granted)

sections.heading: 5. Data Sharing
sections.body:
Your personal data is never sold or shared for advertising, marketing, or third-party analytics purposes.

Your data is shared only with the following parties:

- Supabase: Database and authentication infrastructure provider (compliant with EU data protection standards)
- RevenueCat: Subscription management (subscription status only; payment information is not transferred)
- Apple / Google: Operating system-level authentication and payment processing
- Legal obligation: Upon request from competent authorities within the framework of applicable law

sections.heading: 6. Data Security
sections.body:
- All data is transmitted encrypted over HTTPS/TLS.
- The Supabase infrastructure is protected by Row Level Security; a user can only access data belonging to groups they are a member of.
- Sensitive write operations are performed with server-side authorization checks.

sections.heading: 7. Data Retention and Deletion
sections.body:
Your data is retained for as long as your account is active. If you wish to delete your account, you can use the “Delete My Account” option on the Account screen. This action permanently deletes all your personal data, group memberships, and expense history.

In accordance with app store policy, in-app account deletion is mandatory and this feature is available in the app.

sections.heading: 8. Children's Privacy
sections.body: Groopay is not intended for individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect data from users under 13.

sections.heading: 9. Policy Changes
sections.body: When this policy is updated, a notification will be provided within the app and the “Last updated” date will be changed. For significant changes, a push notification or email may also be sent.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related questions: behavest@proton.me

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance
sections.body: By downloading or using the Groopay app, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

sections.heading: 2. Scope of Service
sections.body:
Groopay is a mobile application designed to track and split shared expenses among small groups.

Groopay does:
- Group creation and member management
- Adding, splitting, and tracking expenses
- Calculating and simplifying debt/credit balances
- Marking and confirming payments
- Multi-currency support (for tracking purposes only)

Groopay does not:
- Process real money transfers or act as a payment intermediary
- Provide banking or financial institution services
- Issue legally binding debt instruments

sections.heading: 3. Account and Membership
sections.body:
- You must create an account to use the app.
- You are responsible for the accuracy of your account information.
- You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account.
- Persons under the age of 13 may not use the app.

sections.heading: 4. Free and Pro Membership
sections.body:
Free plan:
- You may create up to 5 groups (excluding demo groups).
- All core features are available (adding expenses, viewing balances, marking payments).
- Groups may have unlimited members; only group creation is limited.

Pro membership (monthly subscription):
- Unlimited group creation
- Advanced dashboard and analytics features
- Subscription is managed through the app store.
- Upon cancellation, access continues until the end of the billing period; you then revert to the free plan.
- Subscription fees are non-refundable except as required by app store policies.

sections.heading: 5. User Content
sections.body:
- Data you enter into the app (expense information, group names, etc.) belongs to you.
- You grant us the right to store and process this data for the purpose of providing the service.
- You agree not to enter false, misleading, or harmful content.

sections.heading: 6. Prohibited Uses
sections.body:
You may not use the app for:

- Defrauding or misleading others
- Money laundering
- Attempting to circumvent the app's security systems
- Unauthorized access to other users' data
- Any illegal activity

sections.heading: 7. Service Availability
sections.body:
- Groopay does not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free.
- The service may be temporarily unavailable due to maintenance, updates, or unexpected issues.
- Users will be notified in advance of significant changes.

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.body:
- Groopay is not a financial advisor or intermediary. Balances and calculations within the app serve only as an agreement tool between users and have no legal binding force.
- Groopay is not responsible for disputes between users.
- Groopay's liability for damages arising from data loss, service interruption, or calculation errors is limited to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law.

sections.heading: 9. Account Deletion
sections.body: You may delete your account at any time: Account → Delete My Account. Deletion is irreversible; all your data will be permanently deleted.

sections.heading: 10. Changes
sections.body: We may update these terms. For significant changes, an in-app notification will be provided. The current terms are always available on this page. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.heading: 11. Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey. The courts of İzmir shall have jurisdiction over any disputes.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
sections.body: For questions: behavest@proton.me

balance.empty: No balances yet. Add your first expense!
balance.overallMixed: owed in some, owe in others

groupDetail.title: Group Detail
groupDetail.tip1: Expenses tab shows all group spending — add new ones with the + button.
groupDetail.tip2: Balances tab shows who owes whom and how much.
groupDetail.tip3: Simplified view suggests the fewest transactions to settle all debts.
groupDetail.tip4: Tap an expense to see details (who paid what, notes).

addExpense.title: Add Expense
addExpense.tip1: Enter amount and select currency — different currencies are tracked separately.
addExpense.tip2: Equal: split evenly. Custom: per-person amounts. Subset: only selected members.
addExpense.tip3: The payer is the one who actually paid — they can also be part of the split.
addExpense.tip4: Tap the calendar icon to change the date (defaults to today).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.tip1: Use the currency selector to view TRY, EUR, USD expenses separately.
dashboard.tip2: Category breakdown and trend chart show expenses in the selected currency.
dashboard.tip3: Pro unlocks detailed analysis: top payer, debt/credit summary, most active month.
dashboard.tip4: Currencies are never mixed — each currency is calculated separately.

balances.title: Balances
balances.tip1: Green = you're owed, Red = you owe.
balances.tip2: Currencies are shown separately, never converted.
balances.tip3: Tap 'I Paid' — once confirmed, balances update.
balances.tip4: Use 'Request IBAN' to get bank details instantly (never saved).

members.title: Member Management
members.tip1: Ghost member: someone without the app. Founder adds them, later claimable via invite.
members.tip2: Share the invite link to bring real users into the group.
members.tip3: Only the founder can add ghost members; anyone can create an invite link.

account.title: Account
account.tip1: Your display name appears for group members, expense cards, and activity records.
account.tip2: Avatar color makes you easier to recognize in group avatars and summaries.
account.tip3: After saving your language preference, app text switches to the selected language.
account.tip4: Default currency selects the first dashboard filter; different currencies are never converted or combined.
